message:
feat: class instance comparison, property descriptors, Python 3 true division

- Add classInstanceEq/classInstanceNe runtime functions for proper __eq__/__ne__ calls
- Fix property descriptor preservation (analysis phase data no longer overwritten)
- Convert NotImplemented returns to false in comparison methods
- Fix raise statement to use Zig errors (try/except can now catch)
- Handle unknown type comparison by checking for __eq__ method
